title: Handful of Fixes
description: Changes a few textures and fixes a few models.
body:
# Handful of Fixes
**Hi!**

This pack is a compilation of minor fixes that I made!

List of changes:

- blue colored sides of Soul Lantern,
- changed top and bottom texture of Stonecutter,
- changed model of Lectern, now it has carpet also on the bottom,
- a new bottom of Crafting Table,
- a new bottom of Dropper and Dispenser,
- changed the vertical model of Dropper and Dispenser,
- retextured front of Pistons, to make it looks more like planks,
- added top texture to the Gilded Blackstone,
- added top texture to Deepslate ores,
- a new top texture of Cocoa (oficially fixed in new versions)

<hr>

**Check out gallery to see all changes**

**Hope you like it!**

<hr>
